airdrops.name: Berachain
airdrops.description: An EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain built on Proof-of-Liquidity consensus. Join the Artio Testnet to secure potential BERA tokens.
detailedSteps: Add Berachain Artio Network to your Metamask wallet.
Claim BERA testnet tokens from the official faucet.
Swap BERA for STGUSDC and other tokens on BEX DEX.
Provide liquidity to the pool on BEX to earn BGT tokens.
Supply or borrow assets on Bend to earn rewards.
requirements: Discord account for faucet access Verification

airdrops.name: Monad Testnet
airdrops.description: An ultra-high-performance EVM Layer 1 with 10,000+ TPS. Participate in developer testnets and social quests.
detailedSteps: Follow Monad on Twitter and join their official Discord server.
Interact with Monad social campaign hubs on Galxe or Layer3.
Claim Devnet/Testnet faucet tokens when they become available.
Run a local test node if you possess technical capabilities.

airdrops.name: Base Odyssey
airdrops.description: Explore the Base ecosystem and mint exclusive commemorative NFTs. Secure active on-chain footprints.
detailedSteps: Bridge ETH from Ethereum Mainnet to Base network using the official Base Bridge.
Execute at least 3 swaps on Base DEXs like Uniswap, Aerodrome, or Maverick.
Mint the Base commemorative NFT on Zora or Layer3.
Complete the official quests on Base Guild.xyz.

airdrops.name: Solana Blinks Quests
airdrops.description: Experience Solana's new Blockchain Links (Blinks) and claim rewards directly from social feeds.
detailedSteps: Download Phantom Wallet or Backpack Wallet.
Navigate to designated verified Twitter blink links.
Perform actions like voting, staking or donating directly from Twitter.
Sign the transactions on Solana blockchain using your wallet.

airdrops.name: Scroll Origin NFT
airdrops.description: The zkEVM rollup built on Ethereum. Complete on-chain volume and receive your developer status scroll.
detailedSteps: Bridge native ETH to Scroll Mainnet using native scroll bridge.
Interact with Scroll contracts by deploying a smart contract or swapping.
Perform daily swaps over 2 weeks to increase active days score.
requirements: At least $10 in ETH on Scroll mainnet

airdrops.name: Linea Voyage
airdrops.description: Consensys L2 zkEVM blockchain ecosystem campaign. Gain Linea LXP by completing verified quests.
detailedSteps: Complete Linea Voyage quests on Intract or Layer3.
Gain PoH (Proof of Humanity) status to be eligible for rewards.
Engage in defi activities (swaps, liquidity, lending) with Linea partner dApps.
